meanings.definition: be a mystery or bewildering to
examples: Got me--I don't know the answer!

meanings.definition: be uncertain about; think about without fully understanding or being able to decide
examples: We puzzled over her sudden departure
I didn't grasp the meaning of that enigmatic comment until much later
prophetic texts so enigmatic that their meaning has been disputed for centuries

meanings.definition: lacking clarity of meaning; causing confusion or perplexity
examples: perplexing to someone who knew nothing about it
